response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack engineering experience, entrepreneurial initiative with GISCollective, and exposure to AI-agent infrastructure, but lacks clear evidence of AI/ML product ownership, cloud platform strategy leadership, or the 15-year technical depth required for a director-level IC role; his resume shows breadth but not the depth in AI or cloud strategy expected for this position.
strengths: Demonstrated entrepreneurial initiative with open-source GIS platform used by NGOs
Strong full-stack and polyglot engineering skills across web, mobile, and embedded systems
Active contributor to developer tooling and AI-agent infrastructure at re:cinq
concerns: No clear evidence of AI/ML product development or cloud platform strategy leadership
Resume lacks quantifiable impact on AI or cloud infrastructure at scale
15-year experience is implied but fragmented across many short roles with limited seniority progression
